title: nintooa confusa
side_effects: Nintooa confusa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to its essential oils can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, consuming Nintooa confusa extracts can cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even cardiovascular problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any products derived from this plant to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
